feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The Clone Wars is George Lucas canon
entry.content: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pEH PxvgsFis stop saying it was Filoni only, George Lucas was involved in the 6 seasons Ahsoka is canon for George Maul coming back is canon for him, Lucas said he wanted Maul vs Luke in the sequel trilogy

entry.title: /b/ Random: Roll time
entry.content: Roll time

entry.title: /int/ International: If you think a person wouldnt stand up in 3-foot-deep water to avoid drowning youll believe anything
entry.content: Another fake canal drowning story from the same journalist, just under another alias. Reminder: British canals are usually only waist-deep. If you fall in, you can just stand up. They're not the bottomless death traps these stories pretend they are. What's the goal? To spread fear? Or to see how many people will believe the same recycled story until they're conditioned to accept even more implausible ones?

entry.title: /int/ International: Will you be sending your son for a ride on the 'straint? I certainly never would…
entry.content: Will you be sending your son for a ride on the 'straint? I certainly never would and wish it were banned globally

entry.title: /g/ Technology: terrain rendering is actually the bottleneck here, everything else is extremely …
entry.content: terrain rendering is actually the bottleneck here, everything else is extremely fast. What's the most performant way to render large amounts of voxels at once under these circumstances? I have tried raymarching, and while it does beat the rasterizer in close spaces, forests and indoors, it fails miserably in mid-to-long range rendering unless I make it raymarch at 540p and then upscale it to native resolution making it look like DOOM ("soul"?) The engine is designed to work with OpenGL 2.0. and

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I want to build a Python and Raylib app that acts as a keyboard remapper to outp…
entry.content: I want to build a Python and Raylib app that acts as a keyboard remapper to output MIDI notes for my music production software. The app should allow me to select a scale and a key, and then remap the output to that scale. In other words, I want the 'white keys' (the main mapping) of a C major scale to trigger the notes of the specific scale selected in the GUI. please tell me is not a retarded idea.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: guix vs nix
entry.content: has anybody tried both guix and nix? i want to use guix, but for what i understand there are far less packages and its not as well maintained, i also dont agree with the full-FOSS retardation guix comes with (i know nonguix exists but still) i really want to use guix because i like lisps, but is it worth it?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I don't want to call myself a footfag but when I see a hot guy like Ryu I really…
entry.content: I don't want to call myself a footfag but when I see a hot guy like Ryu I really like the fact that he's barefoot. Does that make me a footfag? Like I don't get off to seeing the soles of his feet or anything nor would I want to see someone suck his feet or anything, I'd honestly probably find that disgusting, but I just like that that part of his body is naked. It's like when I see a really hot wrestler on WWE and see that he isn't wearing any wristbands, like I find that to be really hot becau

entry.title: /b/ Random: If you think a person wouldnt stand up in 3-foot-deep water to avoid drowning youll believe anything
entry.content: https://www.expressandstar.com/news /man-dies-after-999-crews-rush-to-d udley-canal-following-reports-of-in cident-8763318 Yet another made-up canal drowning story that defies common sense. This one’s an hour old. This is the same journalist under different aliases making different versions of the same story every week. What is their goal? Is it to spread fear? To see how many people believe the same silly story over and over to get people used to more nonsensical stories in the future?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Chromium based alternatives to Brave
entry.content: I noticed recently that after a few months of usage Brave starts getting really slow and Laggy, the ram consumption was already bad but at least it used to work. Now, opening a tab takes more than it should, loading takes more than it should, tabbing out of a tab requires me to click on it for it to start working and not freeze, videos sluggish and need another click to work again.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why is everyone gay now?
entry.content: Doesn't matter what corner of the internet you use, everyone's gay. Does the internet make you gay? Was it anime? Did you all stare at the guy during porn for too long? Did you play a hentai game where you got fucked by a huge dick and it scrambled your brain irl? Was the mouse utopia experiment just a vision of our actual future where guys groom themselves in to pretty little fags to kiss each other? I need to know what happened to you, anon.

entry.title: /news/ News: A moose walked into an apartment building
entry.content: A new incident has been added to the list of the most unexpected encounters in Kyiv apartment building entrances. A moose wandered into a high-rise building in the Sviatoshynskyi district. Thanks to the assistance of specialists and local residents, it was safely returned to the forest. https://t.me/uniannet/194610

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Can someone explain to me
entry.content: ...why do Abrahamic religions possess such a sheer QUANTITY of rules micromanaging every single minute detail of everyday life? entry.title: /g/ Technology: The market has spoken You shall own nothing and be miserable It’s time to accept…
entry.content: The market has spoken You shall own nothing and be miserable It’s time to accept the facts: 99.9% of people do not need a computer and cloud capital should be reserved for the elite group of society Peasants could access a very limited and metered form of intelligence if they specifically require it, but by and large they don’t need it for anything 99.9% of people only use it now for drafting emails or talking on dating apps or generating shitty diet plans or making AI slop images No use case fo

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I just found out these LED columns on modern vehicles aren't the headlights but …
entry.content: I just found out these LED columns on modern vehicles aren't the headlights but rather Daytime Running Lights. I thought people just didn't know how to work their headlights but apparently they come on automatically when you start the car. What exactly is the point? How does this make the car easier to read in the daytime? Are people blind? >inb4 muh fog Put your fog lights on. Am I crazy? Who greenlights this shit?

entry.content: Bunnies Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. All games, anime and gacha waifus welcom

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: /v/ Data Mining Thread
entry.content: Hi. This is Anon Y. Mous, Senior Data Analyst at Howard & Newell. Our client, AstraOpt, had hired our services to conduct a survey at /v/, to better understand the gaming proclivities of those who live at society's margins, to better deliver their products and services to (You). Our client would like to know your: >age >gender >annual income >social status >color of your favorite pair of socks >10 videogames you liked from the past decade (no remakes or remasters)

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Looking for recs with similar gameplay to these games. I always lose interest in…
entry.content: Looking for recs with similar gameplay to these games. I always lose interest in diablo likes with 1000 enemies and a massive skill tree but I enjoy these ones with precise movement and blocking, simple attributes and skills etc. Can be old, new, indie, dogshit graphics, janky as fuck if you recommend it I will probably try it out. Prefer PC but will emulate if it looks cool. Thanks lads.

entry.title: /int/ International: "Hello! I’m a beginner ornithologist. I study birds in a rather unconventional w…
entry.content: "Hello! I’m a beginner ornithologist. I study birds in a rather unconventional way, and I’m very interested in the opinions of more experienced and qualified people in this field. Here is a 5-minute video of my observations. I would be extremely grateful for any feedback or comments. Have a great day!"

And it doesn’t matter - which market is bullish or bearish - only and only scam scam scam on their platform. Moreover pumpfun just selling us, his customers, a dream, while there are lots of rug pulls on his platform, so indeed pump

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Graphene OS is not degoogled. Recent revelation of security researcher mike kuke…
entry.content: Graphene OS is not degoogled. Recent revelation of security researcher mike kuketz reveals the thruth: https://www.kuketz-blog.de/graphene os-warum-android-eine-verbindung-zu -gstatic-com-aufbaut/ The "privacy" ROM connects to Google's gstatic.com for Certificate Transparency logs. While no app data is leaked, Google captures the user’s public IP address and exact request timestamps during these background HTTPS connections. This enables tracking via cross-correlation: If you open sandboxed apps

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I am unironically going insane
entry.content: This must be some kind of joke. I refuse to believe people actually use this putrid garbage to make stuff. It is simply not possible. Or rather, it is theoretically possible, but no one in their right mind would ever do that, since that would be the equivalent of trying to make a game like Crimson Desert using Assembly. With PHP, it took me 1 week, working 1 hour a day to make a fully functional forum, entierly by myself, and without ever having done it before. With Django, it took me 1 month, w

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /ssg/ Sexy Synthetics general
entry.content: A thread for anything that isn't made out of flesh and blood, Post robots, rubber dolls, latex drones, plushies, pooltoys, synth, figures and anything that's normally considered inanimate like plant, food or stone creatures. All content is welcome, doesn't matter if drawn by a person, Al generated, or even a photo. You can even post a story or greentext. Post anything as long as it fits the theme. Previous thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83206912 We do occasionally post non AI cont

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 7th gen nostalgia
entry.content: It's well known among us gamers that the late 2000's~mid 2010's was ASS for gaming. Brown and piss aesthetic, overpriced DLC's, birth of microtransactions, QTEs and cutscenes, etc. So how do we explain the fact that NORMALFAGs are nostalgic about the era and believe it's the golden age of gaming?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Do people actually sleep with their smartwatch on? I tried one night and it was …
entry.content: Do people actually sleep with their smartwatch on? I tried one night and it was the most uncomfortable thing ever. I don't really give a shit about sleep metrics anyway. I doubt it would do me any good to know that stuff. I already have a fucked-up sleep schedule.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: GTA VI : NEW INFO DISCUSSION
entry.content: Grand Theft Auto VI redefines the concept of open-world (sandbox) gameplay. Explore the most massive, dense, and insane map ever created by Rockstar Games. Traverse the neon-lit streets of a pulsating Vice City, dominate dangerous swamps, crowded beaches, and realistic suburbs that cover the state of Leonida from end to end. Every inch of the scenery has been designed to deliver brutal immersion and total freedom. - Lucia and Jason: Cooperative gameplay and a duo of protagonists The main campaig

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I've had PLENTY of time with this game (unlocked every skin, in the top echelon …
entry.content: I've had PLENTY of time with this game (unlocked every skin, in the top echelon of players) and you know what? I don't think a game has ever EARNED my hatred like this one. I've never played a game that holds such contempt for its players. The enemy design makes me want to punch a fucking hole in the wall. Those shitheads with maces and shields that bounce all over the place and react INSTANTLY to you The random level challenges you basically have to take because the rewards are so good can crea
